zh.lifeSummary: 當Wauthier de Hallewyl de Vormezelles II於1185年出生在比利時維斯吉福拉安德倫希斯特爾時，他的父親Wauthier de Vormezelles de Hallewyn I37歲，母親Berthilde de Wavrin24歲。他於1212年之前與Helswinde在艾歐洛結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1257年8月3日享年72歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Wauthier de Hallewyl de Vormezelles II于1185年出生在比利时維斯吉福拉安德倫希斯特爾时，他的父亲Wauthier de Vormezelles de Hallewyn I37岁，母亲Berthilde de Wavrin24岁。他于1212年之前与Helswinde在艾歐洛结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1257年8月3日享年72岁。

meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey

English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

meanings: Short form of the various boys' names with the first syllable Ed-, especially Edward .

variants.name: Edward
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + weard ‘guard’. This has been one of the most successful of all Old English names, in frequent use from before the Conquest to the present day, and even being exported into other European languages. It was the name of three Anglo-Saxon kings and has been borne by eight kings of England since the Norman Conquest. It is also the name of the youngest son of Queen Elizabeth II . The most influential early bearer was King Edward the Confessor ( ?1002–66 ; ruled 1042–66 ). In a troubled period of English history, he contrived to rule fairly and (for a time at any rate) firmly. But in the latter part of his reign he paid more attention to his religion than to his kingdom. He died childless, and his death sparked off conflicting claims to his throne, which were resolved by the victory of William the Conqueror at the Battle of Hastings. His memory was honoured by Normans and English alike, for his fairness and his piety. Edward's mother was Norman; he had spent part of his youth in Normandy; and William claimed to have been nominated by Edward as his successor. Edward was canonized in the 12th century, and came to be venerated throughout Europe as a model of a Christian king.

en.lifeSummary: When Wauthier de Hallewyl de Vormezelles II was born in 1185, in Gistel, West Flanders, Belgium, his father, Wauthier de Vormezelles de Hallewyn I, was 37 and his mother, Berthilde de Wavrin, was 24. He married Helswinde before 1212, in Europe. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died on 3 August 1257, at the age of 72.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Wauthier de Hallewyl de Vormezelles II est né en 1185, à Gistel, Flandre occidentale, Belgique, son père, Wauthier de Vormezelles de Hallewyn I, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Berthilde de Wavrin, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Helswinde avant 1212, à Europe. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 3 août 1257, à l’âge de 72 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Wauthier de Hallewyl de Vormezelles II 1185 in Gistel, West-Flandern, Belgien geboren wurde, war sein Vater Wauthier de Vormezelles de Hallewyn I 37 und seine Mutter Berthilde de Wavrin 24. Er hat vor 1212 in Europa Helswinde geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 3. August 1257 im Alter von 72 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Wauthier de Hallewyl de Vormezelles II è nato il nel 1185 nel Gistel, Fiandra Occidentale, Belgio, il suo padre, Wauthier de Vormezelles de Hallewyn I, aveva 37 anni e il suo madre, Berthilde de Wavrin, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Helswinde prima del 1212, nel Europa. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 3 agosto 1257, all'età di 72 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Wauthier de Hallewyl de Vormezelles IIが1185年にベルギーウエスト-vラアンデレンギステルで生まれた時，父Wauthier de Vormezelles de Hallewyn Iは37歳，母Berthilde de Wavrinは24歳であった。1212年以前にヨーロッパでHelswindeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1257年8月3日に72歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Wauthier de Hallewyl de Vormezelles II(이)가 1185년 벨기에 웨스트-블라아더 지스텔에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Wauthier de Vormezelles de Hallewyn I(은)는 37세였고, 그의 어머니 Berthilde de Wavrin(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1212년 이전 우럽에서 Helswinde(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1257년 8월 3일 72세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Wauthier de Hallewyl de Vormezelles II nasceu em 1185, em Gistel, Flandres Ocidental, Bélgica, seu pai, Wauthier de Vormezelles de Hallewyn I, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Berthilde de Wavrin, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Helswinde antes 1212, em Europa. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 3 de agosto de 1257, com 72 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Wauthier de Hallewyl de Vormezelles II родился в 1185 г. в местности гистел, вест-влаандирен, Бельгия, его отцу по имени Wauthier de Vormezelles de Hallewyn I было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Berthilde de Wavrin, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Helswinde перед 1212 г. в местности Европа. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер 3 августа 1257 г. в возрасте 72 лет.

sm.from 1218 to 1244: mai le 1218 e o'o I le 1244

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Wauthier de Hallewyl de Vormezelles II nació en 1185, en Gistel, Flandes Occidental, Bélgica, su papá, Wauthier de Vormezelles de Hallewyn I, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Berthilde de Wavrin, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Helswinde antes de 1212, en Europa. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 3 de agosto de 1257, a la edad de 72 años.
